scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @workspace/db run build 2>/dev/null || true && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-zod run build 2>/dev/null || true && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-client-react run build 2>/dev/null || true && BASE_PATH=/ NODE_ENV=production pnpm --filter @workspace/property-tax-grievance run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
